scope: Local synthetic cross language controls for keeping reconciliation exception rows attached to source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch closure boundary, and authority or clearance claim absence.

reviewer_closeout_ledger_reconciliation_.primary_question: Can reconciliation exception rows preserve source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch closure boundary, and authority or clearance claim absence.
blocked_use: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception clearance

release_boundary.allowed_use: Repo local synthetic cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception scoring before public wording reuse.
release_boundary.not_allowed_use: Patient care, clinical advice, translation clearance, reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception clearance, external publication clearance, model ranking, or authority or clearance claim.

exact_next_action: Add cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay controls so exception attachments stay reproducible across recheck and handoff without authority or clearance claim.
